role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, climate, and urban morphology consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified tree species (Betula, Picea) and biome; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road signs (Vienna Convention) and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, camera artifacts) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region (Europe) and narrowed candidates to the Balkans. However, the agents failed to distinguish between Serbia and Bosnia and Herzegovina due to the high visual similarity of socialist-era architecture. The final decision relied on 'meta' cues (camera artifacts, building colors) which were insufficient to override the ground truth.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described apartment blocks, trees, and road surface.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described building colors and street furniture.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The image features generic socialist-era architecture and standard European signage common to both Serbia and Bosnia. The agents correctly identified both as candidates but lacked specific visual differentiators (like unique text or distinct landmarks). The final decision was based on 'meta' cues (camera artifacts, building colors) which are ambiguous and insufficient to definitively rule out the ground truth.
